name: morph-avatar-profile
description: A circular Avatar that morphs into a detailed profile card: the Avatar is a single persistent element that travels and scales from the collapsed circle into the card header (a real shared-element move, not a crossfade) while the Card springs in through AnimatePresence around it. The name and role, a Pro Badge, a bio, a Separator-split stats row and a Follow/Message Button pair stagger in on open and reverse-stagger out on close. Built on framer-motion via block-motion, so the whole morph collapses to a plain crossfade under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: Collapsed, the block is a button wrapping the Avatar with an explicit aria-label ("View <name>'s profile"), so it is keyboard- and screen-reader-reachable
Expanded, the card exposes a labelled close control and the person's name renders as plain text (not a heading) so it never forces a heading level onto the host page
The stats columns are split by real Separators (decorative) and the decorative Avatar/close icons are aria-hidden, so they don't pollute the accessible name
The size/stagger morph respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider, collapsing to a plain crossfade

intents: an avatar that expands into a detailed profile card
a shared-element morph from an avatar to a profile popover
an animated profile card built on ibirdui
